description: Use this API routine to change the status of induction machines that are in-service to out-of- service, and to replace the power flowing from the network into the machine with constant power load. The routine can be directed to process either all in-service induction machines, all in- service induction machines within a specified subsystem, or all in-service induction machines outside of a specified subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = imnet(sid, all, inout)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: inout
parameters.description: Include or exclude induction machines in subsystem sid. (input; 0 by default).

all.description: process only induction machines within, or outside of, subsystem SID.

inout.description: process only machines inside of subsystem SID.
process only machines outside of subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
